name: Freddie Jackson
abstract: Frederick Anthony Jackson (born October 2, 1956) is an American R&B singer. Originally from New York, Jackson began his professional music career in the late 1970s with the California funk band Mystic Merlin.

concerts.label: Honor: Blues, Jazz, Rhythm and Blues, Soul, and Beyond
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] One of the things, I’ve worked with Najee a lot, because he used to open for Freddie Jackson
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
